title: Jump Tilt
description: Mod for fabric 1.20.1+ which brings back the jump tilt from before 1.14 Pre-release 2
body:
- Mod for fabric 1.20.1+ which brings back the jump tilt from before 1.14 Pre-release 2 (https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-225335)
- It also fixes an issue with jump tilt, which probably motivated its removal - tilting doesn't go past 90° and -90° - that means that when you fall and look straight down, tilting disables itself (adjustable with the config file).

# Config file
- Speed: "smoothness" of the tilting (can be set to 0 or more)
- Amount: "aggressivity" of the tilting (how far up and down the camera will tilt) (can be set to any value)
- Lower and upper clamp: after how many degrees of tilting (+/- 90°) the new values from clamping breaks replace the amount
- Clamping breaks: the value with which the amount is going to be replaced after tilting passes the lower or upper clamp (0 means that the tilting will be hard stopped after the clamp)
